name: Fix NIXL Backend Deletion - Build, Deploy, and Validate
description: NIXL Backend 即時削除問題の修正をビルド・デプロイ・検証する統合タスク。カスタム LIBFABRIC プラグインの getConnInfo() が NIXL_SUCCESS を返すように修正済みのソースをビルドし、S3 経由で両ノードにデプロイ、vLLM Consumer/Producer の正常起動を検証する。

tasks.name: Check prerequisites (local build tools)
commands: echo '[CHECK] Verifying local build prerequisites...'
command -v ninja >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo '[ERROR] ninja not found'; exit 1; }
command -v aws >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo '[ERROR] aws CLI not found'; exit 1; }
test -d {{NIXL_SOURCE_DIR}} || { echo '[ERROR] NIXL source directory not found: {{NIXL_SOURCE_DIR}}'; exit 1; }
test -f {{NIXL_BUILD_DIR}}/build.ninja || { echo '[ERROR] NIXL build not configured. Run meson setup first.'; exit 1; }
echo '[OK] All local prerequisites satisfied'

tasks.name: Verify getConnInfo() fix is applied in source
commands: echo '[CHECK] Verifying getConnInfo() fix in source code...'
echo '[CHECK] libfabric_backend.h: conn_info_ member variable...'
grep -n 'std::string conn_info_' {{NIXL_SOURCE_DIR}}/src/plugins/libfabric/libfabric_backend.h || { echo '[ERROR] conn_info_ member not found in header'; exit 1; }
echo '[CHECK] libfabric_backend.cpp: getConnInfo() returns cached data...'
grep -n 'str = conn_info_' {{NIXL_SOURCE_DIR}}/src/plugins/libfabric/libfabric_backend.cpp || { echo '[ERROR] getConnInfo() fix not found in source'; exit 1; }
echo '[CHECK] libfabric_backend.cpp: Constructor serializes conn_info_...'
grep -n 'serializeConnectionInfo.*conn_info_' {{NIXL_SOURCE_DIR}}/src/plugins/libfabric/libfabric_backend.cpp || { echo '[ERROR] Constructor serialization not found'; exit 1; }
echo '[OK] Source code fix verified: getConnInfo() returns NIXL_SUCCESS with cached conn_info_'

tasks.name: Build NIXL with ninja
commands: echo '[BUILD] Building NIXL from {{NIXL_BUILD_DIR}}...'
cd {{NIXL_BUILD_DIR}} && ninja 2>&1 | tail -20
echo '[CHECK] Verifying build output...'
test -f {{NIXL_BUILD_DIR}}/{{PLUGIN_RELATIVE_PATH}} || { echo '[ERROR] Plugin binary not found after build'; exit 1; }
PLUGIN_SIZE=$(stat -c%s {{NIXL_BUILD_DIR}}/{{PLUGIN_RELATIVE_PATH}})
echo "[OK] Build successful. Plugin size: ${PLUGIN_SIZE} bytes"
echo "[INFO] Plugin path: {{NIXL_BUILD_DIR}}/{{PLUGIN_RELATIVE_PATH}}"

tasks.name: Verify plugin has required symbols
commands: echo '[CHECK] Verifying plugin symbols...'
nm -D {{NIXL_BUILD_DIR}}/{{PLUGIN_RELATIVE_PATH}} | grep -E '(nixlLibfabricEngine|getConnInfo)' | head -5
nm -D {{NIXL_BUILD_DIR}}/{{PLUGIN_RELATIVE_PATH}} | grep 'conn_info' && echo '[OK] conn_info_ symbol found' || echo '[INFO] conn_info_ may be inlined (OK for optimized build)'
echo '[CHECK] Checking for getConnInfo in exported symbols...'
nm -D {{NIXL_BUILD_DIR}}/{{PLUGIN_RELATIVE_PATH}} | grep -q 'getConnInfo' && echo '[OK] getConnInfo symbol exported' || echo '[WARN] getConnInfo may be resolved at link time'
echo '[OK] Symbol verification complete'

tasks.name: Upload plugin to S3
commands: echo '[DEPLOY] Uploading plugin to S3...'
aws s3 cp {{NIXL_BUILD_DIR}}/{{PLUGIN_RELATIVE_PATH}} s3://{{S3_BUCKET}}/{{S3_PLUGIN_PATH}} --region {{AWS_REGION}}
echo '[CHECK] Verifying S3 upload...'
aws s3 ls s3://{{S3_BUCKET}}/{{S3_PLUGIN_PATH}} --region {{AWS_REGION}} || { echo '[ERROR] S3 upload verification failed'; exit 1; }
echo '[OK] Plugin uploaded to s3://{{S3_BUCKET}}/{{S3_PLUGIN_PATH}}'

tasks.name: Verify SSH connectivity to both nodes
commands: echo '[CHECK] Testing SSH connectivity to Node1 ({{NODE1_PUBLIC_IP}})...'
ssh {{SSH_OPTS}} {{REMOTE_USER}}@{{NODE1_PUBLIC_IP}} 'echo [OK] Node1 reachable' || { echo '[ERROR] Cannot SSH to Node1'; exit 1; }
echo '[CHECK] Testing SSH connectivity to Node2 ({{NODE2_PUBLIC_IP}})...'
ssh {{SSH_OPTS}} {{REMOTE_USER}}@{{NODE2_PUBLIC_IP}} 'echo [OK] Node2 reachable' || { echo '[ERROR] Cannot SSH to Node2'; exit 1; }
echo '[OK] Both nodes are reachable via SSH'

tasks.name: Stop existing vLLM processes on both nodes
commands: echo '[CLEANUP] Stopping existing vLLM processes on Node1...'
ssh {{SSH_OPTS}} {{REMOTE_USER}}@{{NODE1_PUBLIC_IP}} 'pkill -f "vllm.entrypoints" 2>/dev/null; pkill -f "python.*vllm" 2>/dev/null; sleep 2; echo [OK] Node1 processes stopped' || true
echo '[CLEANUP] Stopping existing vLLM processes on Node2...'
ssh {{SSH_OPTS}} {{REMOTE_USER}}@{{NODE2_PUBLIC_IP}} 'pkill -f "vllm.entrypoints" 2>/dev/null; pkill -f "python.*vllm" 2>/dev/null; sleep 2; echo [OK] Node2 processes stopped' || true
echo '[CLEANUP] Clearing GPU memory on Node1...'
ssh {{SSH_OPTS}} {{REMOTE_USER}}@{{NODE1_PUBLIC_IP}} 'nvidia-smi --query-compute-apps=pid --format=csv,noheader | xargs -r kill -9 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; echo [OK] Node1 GPU cleared' || true
echo '[CLEANUP] Clearing GPU memory on Node2...'
ssh {{SSH_OPTS}} {{REMOTE_USER}}@{{NODE2_PUBLIC_IP}} 'nvidia-smi --query-compute-apps=pid --format=csv,noheader | xargs -r kill -9 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; echo [OK] Node2 GPU cleared' || true
echo '[OK] Existing processes stopped on both nodes'

tasks.name: Backup existing plugins on both nodes
commands: TIMESTAMP=$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S)
echo '[BACKUP] Backing up existing plugin on Node1...'

ssh {{SSH_OPTS}} {{REMOTE_USER}}@{{NODE1_PUBLIC_IP}} "test -f {{REMOTE_PLUGIN_DIR}}/{{REMOTE_PLUGIN_FILE}} && cp {{REMOTE_PLUGIN_DIR}}/{{REMOTE_PLUGIN_FILE}} {{REMOTE_PLUGIN_DIR}}/{{REMOTE_PLUGIN_FILE}}.backup-${TIMESTAMP} && echo '[OK] Node1 backup created' || echo '[INFO] No existing plugin on Node1'"
echo '[BACKUP] Backing up existing plugin on Node2...'

ssh {{SSH_OPTS}} {{REMOTE_USER}}@{{NODE2_PUBLIC_IP}} "test -f {{REMOTE_PLUGIN_DIR}}/{{REMOTE_PLUGIN_FILE}} && cp {{REMOTE_PLUGIN_DIR}}/{{REMOTE_PLUGIN_FILE}} {{REMOTE_PLUGIN_DIR}}/{{REMOTE_PLUGIN_FILE}}.backup-${TIMESTAMP} && echo '[OK] Node2 backup created' || echo '[INFO] No existing plugin on Node2'"
echo '[OK] Backup complete'

tasks.name: Deploy plugin to Node1 from S3
commands: echo '[DEPLOY] Deploying plugin to Node1 ({{NODE1_PUBLIC_IP}})...'
ssh {{SSH_OPTS}} {{REMOTE_USER}}@{{NODE1_PUBLIC_IP}} 'aws s3 cp s3://{{S3_BUCKET}}/{{S3_PLUGIN_PATH}} /tmp/{{REMOTE_PLUGIN_FILE}} --region {{AWS_REGION}}'
ssh {{SSH_OPTS}} {{REMOTE_USER}}@{{NODE1_PUBLIC_IP}} 'cp /tmp/{{REMOTE_PLUGIN_FILE}} {{REMOTE_PLUGIN_DIR}}/{{REMOTE_PLUGIN_FILE}} && chmod 755 {{REMOTE_PLUGIN_DIR}}/{{REMOTE_PLUGIN_FILE}}'
echo '[CHECK] Verifying deployed plugin on Node1...'
ssh {{SSH_OPTS}} {{REMOTE_USER}}@{{NODE1_PUBLIC_IP}} 'ls -lh {{REMOTE_PLUGIN_DIR}}/{{REMOTE_PLUGIN_FILE}}'
ssh {{SSH_OPTS}} {{REMOTE_USER}}@{{NODE1_PUBLIC_IP}} 'rm -f /tmp/{{REMOTE_PLUGIN_FILE}}'
echo '[OK] Plugin deployed to Node1'

tasks.name: Deploy plugin to Node2 from S3
commands: echo '[DEPLOY] Deploying plugin to Node2 ({{NODE2_PUBLIC_IP}})...'
ssh {{SSH_OPTS}} {{REMOTE_USER}}@{{NODE2_PUBLIC_IP}} 'aws s3 cp s3://{{S3_BUCKET}}/{{S3_PLUGIN_PATH}} /tmp/{{REMOTE_PLUGIN_FILE}} --region {{AWS_REGION}}'
ssh {{SSH_OPTS}} {{REMOTE_USER}}@{{NODE2_PUBLIC_IP}} 'cp /tmp/{{REMOTE_PLUGIN_FILE}} {{REMOTE_PLUGIN_DIR}}/{{REMOTE_PLUGIN_FILE}} && chmod 755 {{REMOTE_PLUGIN_DIR}}/{{REMOTE_PLUGIN_FILE}}'
echo '[CHECK] Verifying deployed plugin on Node2...'
ssh {{SSH_OPTS}} {{REMOTE_USER}}@{{NODE2_PUBLIC_IP}} 'ls -lh {{REMOTE_PLUGIN_DIR}}/{{REMOTE_PLUGIN_FILE}}'
ssh {{SSH_OPTS}} {{REMOTE_USER}}@{{NODE2_PUBLIC_IP}} 'rm -f /tmp/{{REMOTE_PLUGIN_FILE}}'
echo '[OK] Plugin deployed to Node2'

tasks.name: Verify plugin integrity on both nodes (size and symbols)
commands: echo '[VERIFY] Checking plugin integrity on both nodes...'
echo "[INFO] Local plugin size: $(stat -c%s {{NIXL_BUILD_DIR}}/{{PLUGIN_RELATIVE_PATH}}) bytes"
echo "[INFO] Node1 plugin size: $(ssh {{SSH_OPTS}} {{REMOTE_USER}}@{{NODE1_PUBLIC_IP}} 'stat -c%s {{REMOTE_PLUGIN_DIR}}/{{REMOTE_PLUGIN_FILE}}') bytes"
echo "[INFO] Node2 plugin size: $(ssh {{SSH_OPTS}} {{REMOTE_USER}}@{{NODE2_PUBLIC_IP}} 'stat -c%s {{REMOTE_PLUGIN_DIR}}/{{REMOTE_PLUGIN_FILE}}') bytes"

LOCAL_SIZE=$(stat -c%s {{NIXL_BUILD_DIR}}/{{PLUGIN_RELATIVE_PATH}}) && REMOTE_SIZE_N1=$(ssh {{SSH_OPTS}} {{REMOTE_USER}}@{{NODE1_PUBLIC_IP}} 'stat -c%s {{REMOTE_PLUGIN_DIR}}/{{REMOTE_PLUGIN_FILE}}') && REMOTE_SIZE_N2=$(ssh {{SSH_OPTS}} {{REMOTE_USER}}@{{NODE2_PUBLIC_IP}} 'stat -c%s {{REMOTE_PLUGIN_DIR}}/{{REMOTE_PLUGIN_FILE}}') && test "${LOCAL_SIZE}" = "${REMOTE_SIZE_N1}" && test "${LOCAL_SIZE}" = "${REMOTE_SIZE_N2}" && echo '[OK] Plugin size matches on both nodes' || { echo '[ERROR] Plugin size mismatch detected'; exit 1; }
echo '[VERIFY] Checking NIXL import on Node1...'
ssh {{SSH_OPTS}} {{REMOTE_USER}}@{{NODE1_PUBLIC_IP}} 'python3 -c "import nixl; print(f\"[OK] NIXL import successful: {nixl.__file__}\")"'
echo '[VERIFY] Checking NIXL import on Node2...'
ssh {{SSH_OPTS}} {{REMOTE_USER}}@{{NODE2_PUBLIC_IP}} 'python3 -c "import nixl; print(f\"[OK] NIXL import successful: {nixl.__file__}\")"'
echo '[OK] Plugin integrity verified on both nodes'

tasks.name: Validate Backend creation succeeds (no NIXL_ERR_INVALID_PARAM)
commands: echo '[VALIDATE] Testing Backend creation on Node2 (Consumer)...'

ssh {{SSH_OPTS}} {{REMOTE_USER}}@{{NODE2_PUBLIC_IP}} 'python3 -c "import nixl; agent = nixl.nixl_agent(\"test-backend-validation\"); agent.create_backend(\"LIBFABRIC\", {}); print(\"[OK] Backend LIBFABRIC created successfully - getConnInfo() returned NIXL_SUCCESS\")"'
echo '[OK] Backend creation validation passed on Node2'

tasks.name: Validate Backend creation on Node1 (Producer)
commands: echo '[VALIDATE] Testing Backend creation on Node1 (Producer)...'

ssh {{SSH_OPTS}} {{REMOTE_USER}}@{{NODE1_PUBLIC_IP}} 'python3 -c "import nixl; agent = nixl.nixl_agent(\"test-backend-validation-n1\"); agent.create_backend(\"LIBFABRIC\", {}); print(\"[OK] Backend LIBFABRIC created successfully on Node1\")"'
echo '[OK] Backend creation validation passed on Node1'

tasks.name: Print deployment summary
commands: echo 'NIXL Backend Deletion Fix - Deployment Summary'
echo ''
echo '[FIX] getConnInfo() now returns NIXL_SUCCESS with cached conn_info_'
echo '[FIX] Backend is no longer deleted during createBackend()'
echo ''
echo 'Deployed to:'
echo '  Node1 (Producer): {{NODE1_PUBLIC_IP}} ({{NODE1_PRIVATE_IP}})'
echo '  Node2 (Consumer): {{NODE2_PUBLIC_IP}} ({{NODE2_PRIVATE_IP}})'
echo '  S3: s3://{{S3_BUCKET}}/{{S3_PLUGIN_PATH}}'
echo ''
echo 'Plugin location on nodes:'
echo '  {{REMOTE_PLUGIN_DIR}}/{{REMOTE_PLUGIN_FILE}}'
echo ''
echo 'Next steps:'
echo '  1. Start Producer (Node1) with vLLM + NIXL LIBFABRIC backend'
echo '  2. Start Consumer (Node2) with vLLM + NIXL LIBFABRIC backend'
echo '  3. Start Proxy Server and run Disaggregated Inference test'
echo '  4. Verify KV-Cache transfer completes without NIXL_ERR_INVALID_PARAM'
echo ''
echo '[DONE] Deployment complete. Ready for Disaggregated Inference testing.'
